Join us and bring your energy, creativity, and leadership to our kitchen team!

title: Spanish-Speaking Investment Counsellor – $300bn+ AUM
description: A highly sophisticated and rapidly growing US wealth management firm is seeking a Spanish\-speaking Investment Counsellor to join its European business. Over the past few years, the firm has grown from a small regional presence to a team of more than 100 professionals across Europe \& Ireland, establishing itself as one of the fastest\-growing players in the private wealth industry. This growth is driven by a strong client proposition, exceptional investment performance, and significant investment in its people. This role is particularly attractive for ambitious professionals looking to accelerate their careers within a meritocratic environment. The firm provides extensive training, mentorship, and a clearly defined progression path, while offering direct exposure to high\-net\-worth and ultra\-high\-net\-worth investors. **The Opportunity** You will inherit an established portfolio of more than €100\-150 million in client assets from day one, with responsibility for maintaining and strengthening long\-term client relationships. Your success will be measured primarily on client retention, relationship quality, and overall client satisfaction rather than new business generation. Depending on your background and language capabilities, the client base will predominantly consist of Spanish\-speaking high\-net\-worth investors. **Key Responsibilities** * Manage and develop relationships with an established portfolio of HNW clients * Act as a trusted adviser and primary point of contact for investors * Deliver a first\-class client experience through regular engagement and proactive communication * Work closely with investment teams to ensure client objectives are achieved * Maintain high levels of client retention and satisfaction * Support clients through portfolio reviews, market discussions, and investment\-related queries **Package** * Base Salary: €82,000 * Discretionary Bonus: €15,000–€20,000 for good to above\-average performers * Established €100M\+ client portfolio * Full relocation support * Additional €15,000 relocation allowance * Extensive training and career development programme **Profile** The ideal candidate will: * Be fluent in Spanish and English * Have experience working with high\-net\-worth clients, private banking, wealth management, or investment advisory clients * Be ambitious, energetic, and highly motivated * Possess excellent communication and relationship\-building skills * Demonstrate the ability to earn trust and maintain long\-term client relationships * Have a strong desire to develop professionally and increase earnings over time This is an outstanding opportunity to join a market\-leading growth story and build a long\-term career within one of the most successful wealth management platforms globally.

title: Sr. SDE, Distributed Databases
description: At eBay, we're more than a global ecommerce leader — we’re changing the way the world shops and sells. Our platform empowers millions of buyers and sellers in more than 190 markets around the world. We’re committed to pushing boundaries and leaving our mark as we reinvent the future of ecommerce for enthusiasts. Our customers are our compass, authenticity thrives, bold ideas are welcome, and everyone can bring their unique selves to work — every day. We're in this together, sustaining the future of our customers, our company, and our planet. Join a team of passionate thinkers, innovators, and dreamers — and help us connect people and build communities to create economic opportunity for all. **About The Team And The Role** eBay is seeking a Senior Engineer for their Cloud Databases and Storage organization, that builds and runs petabyte scale core data platform that powers large scale database, storage, caching and media infrastructure. This position will have the opportunity to architect, build and operate the next generation distributed database and storage platform that powers some of the most critical systems powering eBay’s global ecommerce business. You will be responsible for scaling eBay’s core data infrastructure by working closely with other engineers, customers, business partners, and product managers. **What You Will Accomplish** You will be building and managing massively scalable database and storage systems for eBay * As a self\-motivated and enthusiastic technical leader of our team, you will collaborate with extremely inquisitive and proficient peers leading and designing data infrastructure using your strong background in distributed systems, storage and large\-scale database systems * You will work in an agile environment with a focus on problem solving and engineering precision. As a technical leader you are expected to assess technology problems, design optimal solutions and drive implementation to meet the business expectations * You will collaborate closely with peers Architects, Engineering leaders and Product Managers to develop innovative solutions that meet functional and non\-functional standards and expectations * As a senior engineer, you will guide junior in your team and also across other cloud teams in building scalable, high speed, distributed systems and advocate for meeting the design and quality standards * You will contribute to the design, development, testing, release, triage, bug fix, documentation and rest of the cycles in product development and maintenance **What You Will Bring** * Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science plus 8\+ years of experience or MS in Computer Science plus 6\+ years of hands\-on experience in building large\-scale distributed systems * Excellent understanding of computer science fundamentals, data structures and algorithms * Experience in architecting, designing and developing large\-scale, multi\-tiered, distributed software systems, storage and database * Extensive hands\-on experience and expertise in Object\-Oriented Design, Distributed Programming, and: C\+\+ and various database systems (NoSQL and relational) at scale * Drive architecture discussions, produce well\-documented design docs, and participate in design and code reviews * Ensure code quality and maintainability by evolving architecture and tech stack, refactoring, standards and improving build and test systems * Share engineering support, release, and on\-call responsibilities for an always\-on follow the sun model. **Additional Details** eBay is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran status, and disability, or other legally protected status. If you have a need that requires accommodation, please contact us at talent@ebay.com. We will make every effort to respond to your request for accommodation as soon as possible. View our accessibility statement to learn more about eBay's commitment to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We use cookies to enhance your experience and may use AI tools for administrative tasks in the hiring process. To learn how we handle your personal data and use AI responsibly, please visit our Talent Privacy Notice, Privacy Center, and AI Hiring Guidelines.

title: Sr. SDE, Workforce Solutions (WS)
description: **Description** Come help us create innovative capabilities for Amazon's Associates, managers, and leaders to support the evolution of People eXperience and Technology (PXT). The Workforce Solutions (WS) team builds and delivers world\-class products/services for Amazon's employees, we believe that happy Amazon customers start with happy Amazon employees! We give Amazon associates around the globe the flexibility to enrich their job experience through pay incentives and job mobility. We thrive on developing world\-class experiences for associates worldwide to empower them to increase their income, explore job options, train, choose, and progress in their careers at Amazon. As a member of this team, you are changing people's lives by creating the tools that help them advance in their careers! We're seeking a self\-driven professional with strong communication skills who can deliver high\-quality results in our fast\-paced environment. Key job responsibilities * Define and drive the technical vision and architecture for services that provide Amazon employees with pay, training, and career mobility options at global scale * Architect highly available, scalable, serverless solutions handling diverse workflows and country\-specific rules/regulations * Lead system design decisions and trade\-offs; navigate ambiguity where technical strategy is not yet defined * Own end\-to\-end delivery — from concept through design, development, deployment, and production operations * Influence cross\-team architecture and resolve technical dependencies proactively * Mentor junior engineers through code reviews, design reviews, and engineering best practices * Drive operational excellence for tier\-one services — own runbooks, incident response, and reliability improvements * Break down complex, multi\-year efforts into executable phases and deliver with limited guidance * Collaborate with PM\-T, SDMs, and stakeholders to translate business needs into technical solutions * Innovate on behalf of the employee using modern technologies; challenge norms and introduce new patterns * Raise the engineering bar through hiring, technical assessments, and fostering a culture of ownership **About The Team** Workforce Solutions (WS) is a horizontal, multi\-discipline organization whose mission is to build the best people\-forward technology to enable corporate recruitment for Amazon, globally. From the candidate\-facing job site, to ensuring the role is filled \- we build the entire gamut. We value people\-centric solutions, and open exchange of ideas. The team has a clear product and service north star, but remains flexible in the paths to achieve that goal. **Basic Qualifications** * Experience as a mentor, tech lead or leading an engineering team * Experience leading the architecture and design (architecture, design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and current systems * Experience in professional, non\-internship software development * Experience programming with at least one modern language such as Java, C\+\+, or C\# including object\-oriented design * Experience in development in the last 3 years **Preferred Qualifications** * Bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent * Experience with full software development life cycle, including coding standards, code reviews, source control management, build processes, testing, and operations Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. title: Study Start Up Specialist (with Italian)
description: Support Project Management, Regulatory, and Contract and Legal in all site\-related start\-up activities. Establish relationships with study personnel at sites and act as main Alimentiv contact during site start\-up. Prepare, distribute and follow\-up on start\-up documents with sites. Plan and track site start up activities and data using designated systems and tools. Provide reports on intelligence and metrics related to study start\-up activities. **Role and Responsibilities:** **1\. Site Start\-Up Packages** • In cooperation with Project Management create study\-specific start\-up document package. • Distribute and follow up with sites to obtain the required executed documents. • Review content and correctness of returned documents from the sites, in accordance with internal standards. • In conjunction with Regulatory Affairs, ensure that the correct and complete packages are obtained within the planned timelines. **2\. Site Contract and Budget Negotiation** • In co\-operation with Contract and Legal, obtain feedback on suggested site and investigator contract language. • Act as main point of contact for sites to obtain feedback on budget and contract negotiations. • In conjunction with the Project Manager, provide sites with the suggested study budget and negotiate within pre\-approved margins. **3\. Site Intelligence Tracking** • Maintain site intelligence tracker with data related to specific requirements for study sites such as start\-up timelines, budget, contract negotiation timelines and prerequisites, patient recruitment data etc. • Provide input for suggested site list during start\-up using past experiences with potential study sites. **4\. Site Start\-Up Planning and Tracking \& Project Management Support** • Act as main contact for study sites during start\-up. • Develop and maintain relationships with study sites that will facilitate timely completion of start\-up activities. • In conjunction with project management and CRAs, plan start\-up actions and provide expected SIV dates for individual sites based on previous start\-up metrics, as well as regulatory and IRB timelines. • Track progress of start\-up activities in smart sheet and/or CTMS. • Maintain up to date knowledge, ensure adherence and compliance with local regulatory requirements and associated documentation. • Provide support to project management with study related activities as required. **Qualifications:** * Undergraduate university degree (Bachelor or Honors Bachelor) and Minimal Training (brief orientation or introductory training); less than 1 years' related experience; * Or College Diploma/Degree and 1\-3 years' related experience with initial and On\-going training **Other:** * Excellent communication skills * Knowledge of start\-up requirements for clinical sites * Experience in working directly with clinical study sites through previous involvement in studies * Very high sense of urgency. * Some financial responsibility (handling of small cash floats, minimal spending limits, can provide input during department budget creation) * Sets personal pace and content (significant scope for setting pace and action order within the context of tasks to complete) * Large number of regular contacts (team/unit members/vendors/clients, occasionally difficult, requiring patience and tact) * English and Italian language skills **Working Conditions:** * Home\-based PHISHING SCAM WARNING: Alimentiv is aware of the continued increase of phishing scams, leveraging various methods of attack via email, text, voice and social media. Please note that Alimentiv only uses company email addresses, which contain “@ alimentiv.com ”, to communicate with candidates via email. If you are contacted by someone about an open job at Alimentiv, please verify the domain of the sender’s email address and that they are asking you to apply on this website. If you believe you’ve been a victim of a phishing scam, please contact your local government cyber authority to report. \*Accommodations for job applicants with disabilities are available upon request. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Success Architect - Industries cloud
description: *To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.* Job Category Customer Success Job Details **About Salesforce** Salesforce is the \#1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all. Ready to level\-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce. Cloud Success is a specialized team within Customer Success, bringing together customer support engineers, proactive monitoring, specialist product advisors and technical architects. This team not only resolves technical issues but also provides expert guidance on optimizing and demonstrating Salesforce technology to drive long term business success.Success Architects, as part of Cloud Success, play a pivotal role in supporting Salesforce’s most critical and strategic customers. They provide expert guidance on solution design, ensuring scalability, security, and alignment to standard methodologies. By assessing system performance, they help optimize efficiency and reliability while proactively identifying risks and recommending improvements to maintain technical health. Additionally, they offer strategic insights into application lifecycle management, enabling customers to plan, develop, and evolve their Salesforce implementations effectively. Through deep expertise, Success Architects empower businesses to improve their Salesforce investment, aligning technology with business goals for long\-term success. The Success Architect collaborates closely with various teams across Customer Success and the Product organization to drive long\-term solutions for customers. They work with support engineers to resolve immediate technical challenges while identifying root causes to prevent future issues. Partnering with customer success managers, they ensure customers receive strategic guidance on standard methodologies and long\-term technology health. Additionally, they liaise with Salesforce product teams, surfacing recurring challenges and customer feedback to influence product improvements. By bridging the gap between customers, support, and product development, Success Architects help create sustainable solutions that enhance the overall Salesforce experience. As a Success Architect specializing in Industries (see below Cloud expertise), you will: Drive Customer Impact – Partner with our most strategic and high\-priority customers, assessing their Cloud implementations and delivering expert recommendations on technical architecture, solution design, application lifecycle management, reliability, and feature adoption. Industry cloud expertise: you’re an SME in several of these Industry Clouds: Consumer Good Cloud, Manufacturing Cloud, Non Profit Cloud, Loyalty Management, Public Sector Sector Solutions, Education Cloud, Omnistudio Lead with Expertise – Serve as a trusted Core Clouds SME within the broader Success Architect organization providing both proactive and reactive guidance on architecture, technology strategy, thought leadership, and product best practices. You will help the team stay at the forefront of Industry Clouds innovations in your area of expertise, ensuring they are equipped with the latest product developments, best practices, and emerging trends. Communicate with Clarity – Simplify complex technical concepts for diverse audiences, from technical teams to executive leadership, positioning yourself as a trusted advisor in key business and technology discussions. Innovate \& Solve Problems – Identify capability gaps and design inefficiencies, recommending product enhancements or creative custom solutions that drive customer success and long\-term adoption. Execute Proven Strategies – Leverage and tailor Success Architect playbooks to meet the unique challenges and opportunities of Financial Services Cloud customers. Build Strong Relationships – Collaborate with internal and external partners, fostering connections that drive customer success, product improvement, and overall business growth. Basic Requirements: * Solution Design \& Architecture * Proven years of experience in software, system, or enterprise architecture. * Expertise in Salesforce products, platform capabilities, technical governance, and best practices. * Experience with large\-scale, complex implementations, including SaaS, PaaS, multi\-tenancy, and multi\-tiered infrastructure. * Strong knowledge of enterprise application integration, covering process orchestration, master data management, AI, analytics, and security best practices. * Familiarity with vertical\-specific solutions among retail, manufacturing, education, non\-profit (preferred). * Communication \& Leadership * Ability to assess business objectives, propose solution options, and drive stakeholder alignment. * Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to present complex technical concepts to both business and executive audiences. * Skilled in creating clear, visually compelling design documents for diverse stakeholders. * Proven ability to lead discussions, influence decision\-making, and advocate for best practices. * Strategic Thinking \& Problem Solving * Ability to identify design inefficiencies, recommend optimizations, and drive customer transformation. * Provide data\-driven insights on customer success stories and industry trends. Passion for continuous learning and staying ahead of emerging technologies. * Desired Technical Skills: * Expertise in Industry Clouds * Strong knowledge of several clouds including: Consumer Good Cloud (including TPM), Manufacturing Cloud, Non Profit Cloud, Loyalty Management, Public Sector Sector Solutions, Education Cloud, Health Cloud, Life Science, Financial Service Cloud * OmniStudio Knowledge * Ability to configure and optimize these features to meet business needs. * Data Management \& Integration * Proficient in designing and managing data models, relationships (lookup/master\-detail), validation rules, and data governance best practices. * Experience with data import/export strategies, deduplication, ETL tools, and integrating Salesforce with external systems via REST/SOAP APIs, middleware (MuleSoft, Informatica), and third\-party connectors. * Secure \& Scalable Architecture * Expertise in role hierarchy, sharing rules, profiles, permission sets, and security configurations. * Proven ability to design scalable, high\-performance architectures aligned with Salesforce best practices, including Large Data Volume (LDV) considerations. * Skilled in identifying and resolving common anti\-patterns, including inefficient SOQL queries, improper bulk processing, excessive DML operations, and suboptimal sharing and security model configurations. * Salesforce Development * Hands\-on experience with APEX programming, Visualforce, and Lightning Web Components (LWC). * Ability to develop and optimize custom triggers, controllers, batch jobs, and asynchronous processing. * Familiarity with governor limits and best practices for efficient code execution. * System Integration \& Extensibility * Strong understanding of integrating Salesforce with other enterprise systems using APIs, middleware, and event\-driven architectures. Experience working with OAuth, Platform Events, External Objects, and tools like Salesforce Connect and Event Relay. * Certifications: * Required: Salesforce Admin, Salesforce Advanced Admin, Service Cloud Consultant * Desired: Platform App Builder, Platform Developer 1, Certified Architect Credentials (Application and System Architect), OmniStudio Consultant, Agentforce Specialist * LI\-Y Unleash Your Potential When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and *be your best* , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can *do your best* . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world. Accommodations If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form . Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options. Posting Statement Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non\-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

title: System Administrator
description: **About Air Apps** At Air Apps, we believe in thinking bigger—and moving faster. We’re a family\-founded company on a mission to create the world’s first AI\-powered Personal \& Entrepreneurial Resource Planner (PRP), and we need your passion and ambition to help us change how people plan, work, and live. Born in Lisbon, Portugal in 2018—and now with offices in both Lisbon and San Francisco—we’ve remained self\-funded while reaching over 100 million downloads worldwide. Our long\-term focus drives us to challenge the status quo every day, pushing the boundaries of AI\-driven solutions that truly make a difference. Here, you’ll be a creative force, shaping products that empower people across the globe. Join us on this journey to redefine resource management—and change lives along the way. **The Role** As a **Systems Administrator** at Air Apps, you will be responsible for **managing and maintaining corporate IT infrastructure, user access, and SaaS tools** to ensure a secure and efficient work environment. You will oversee **device management, network security, access control, and IT support** for employees across the organization. This role requires **technical expertise in IT systems, cloud\-based tools, and security best practices** to optimize and scale internal operations. * This is a fully onsite position, based at our office in Lisbon, where you will collaborate closely with cross\-functional teams in person and contribute to a dynamic and fast\-paced environment. We are open to support with relocation efforts. **Responsibilities** * Manage and maintain corporate IT infrastructure, including SaaS applications, cloud services, and internal systems. * Oversee user access, account provisioning, and identity management across platforms (Google Workspace, Okta, Azure AD, etc.). * Ensure network security, endpoint protection, and data encryption policies are in place. * Monitor and optimize hardware and software performance, troubleshooting issues as needed. * Implement and enforce IT security best practices, including multi\-factor authentication (MFA) and role\-based access control (RBAC). * Maintain and support company\-wide SaaS tools (Slack, Zoom, Notion, Atlassian, etc.). * Assist in onboarding and offboarding employees by setting up and deactivating accounts. * Automate IT operations, workflows, and system monitoring to improve efficiency. * Maintain software licenses, compliance requirements, and IT documentation. * Provide technical support and training to employees, ensuring smooth system usage. **Requirements** * Around 3\+ years of experience in IT administration, systems administration, or IT support. * Experience managing cloud\-based corporate IT environments (Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, AWS, or Azure). * Proficiency in identity and access management (IAM) tools (Okta, Azure AD, JumpCloud). * Knowledge of endpoint management solutions (Jamf, Intune, Kandji, or similar MDM platforms). * Familiarity with network security, VPNs, firewalls, and zero\-trust security models. * Experience with IT automation and scripting (Bash, PowerShell, Python) is a plus. * Ability to troubleshoot hardware, software, and connectivity issues efficiently. * Strong understanding of IT compliance, data privacy regulations (GDPR, SOC 2\), and best practices. * Excellent problem\-solving skills and ability to work in a fast\-paced, remote\-first environment. **What benefits are we offering?** * Apple hardware ecosystem for work. * Annual Bonus * Top\-tier Health and Life Insurance for peace of mind. * Transportation Budget to support your commute needs. * Coverflex benefits package for meal allowances, well\-being, and more. * Childcare support. * Air Conference \- an opportunity to meet the team, collaborate, and grow together. * Pension Fund to support your long\-term financial planning. * Urban Sports Club membership to keep you active. * Meals 100% free at the hub. **Diversity \& Inclusion** At Air Apps, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace. We enthusiastically welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We celebrate diversity in all its forms and believe that varied voices and experiences make us stronger. **Application Disclaimer** At Air Apps, we value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants must submit their own work without any AI\-generated assistance. Any use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification.

title: Systems Development Engineer, AWS Incident Response (AIR), AWS Incident Response (AIR)
description: **Description** AWS Incident Response (AIR) ensures the high availability of Amazon Web Services by making customer\-impacting events shorter and less frequent through incident detection, management, and automated mitigation. Our systems monitor AWS infrastructure in real\-time, automatically detect impairments, and orchestrate responses to minimize customer impact across regions and services. As a Systems Development Engineer on the AIR team, you will lead the response to critical customer\-impacting events — triaging impact, identifying root causes, coordinating mitigation actions with service teams, and driving resolution in real\-time. Not every event is solved by automation; you will use your technical judgment to assess situations, engage the right teams, and direct mitigation strategies when manual intervention is required. Insights from these events directly inform the automation and tooling you build — creating a continuous improvement loop where each event makes the next one shorter or prevents it entirely. This role offers a unique combination of systems development and real\-time operational leadership, with direct impact on the availability of AWS services used by millions of customers. Key job responsibilities * Drive the resolution of large\-scale customer\-impacting incidents as part of an on\-call rotation (including weekends and holidays), leading incident calls and coordinating resolver teams across AWS service organizations * Design, build, and enhance incident detection, triage, and mitigation automation tools * Author COEs and event deep\-dive documents to identify improvement opportunities; create and lead action items that improve processes, tooling, and automation * Identify recurring platform issues and own projects that eliminate entire classes of operational problems * Collaborate with teams globally to expand incident response capabilities across AWS regions and services A day in the life A Systems Development Engineer on the AWS Incident Response (AIR) team has full visibility on all AWS services! There are limitless opportunities to learn as you will work with all AWS internal teams and have exposure to AWS products and services. When on\-call, your day may start with large scale event — you join the conference bridge, assess the scope of impact using real\-time dashboards, identify impaired services, engage the right teams, and drive mitigation until the event is resolved. After the event, you lead the deep\-dive, document findings, and create action items to prevent recurrence. When off\-call, you spend your time building and improving the tools that make incident response faster and more automated. You might be writing code to improve event detection logic, building dashboards that surface the right signals during triage, or working on automation that reduces manual steps during mitigation. You participate in design / code reviews and collaborate with engineers across AIR to drive operational improvements. You also invest time in learning AWS service architectures — understanding how services fail helps you respond faster when they do. **About The Team** AWS Incident Response (AIR) is a globally distributed team responsible for leading the large\-scale customer\-impacting events across AWS. We operate 24/7, providing incident leadership and coordination for events that span multiple services and regions. We work closely with service teams, networking, and infrastructure organizations across AWS, giving our engineers broad exposure to how AWS operates under the hood. **Basic Qualifications** * Knowledge of systems engineering fundamentals (networking, storage, operating systems) * Experience designing or architecting (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems * Experience in networking, storage systems, operating systems and hands\-on systems engineering * Experience programming with at least one modern language such as C\+\+, C\#, Java, Python, Golang, PowerShell, Ruby **Preferred Qualifications** * Experience in automating, deploying, and supporting large\-scale infrastructure * Experience in automation or monitoring frameworks, deployment or development * Experience that includes strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and effective communication abilities, or experience in managing and troublshooting network * * Experience leading high\-severity incident conference calls and driving resolution across multiple stakeholder teams * * Experience authoring detailed event deep\-dive documents and driving action items to closure with service teams Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. title: Technical Solutions Engineer
description: **Protex AI is the AI Safety and Operations Intelligence Company.** At Protex AI, we are at the forefront of AI\-driven computer vision, building a safer, smarter industrial workplace with an intelligent operating system that redefines how facilities operate. Backed by top\-tier global investors, we recently secured a $36 million Series B to accelerate our mission. Industry leaders like DHL, Amazon, and Tesla trust Protex AI to drive measurable safety improvements, achieving an average 64% risk reduction within just three months of deployment. Operating in 20\+ countries, Protex is the go\-to safety partner for Fortune 500 manufacturing and logistics enterprises, transforming workplace safety with real\-time, AI\-powered insights. **Client Solutions Technical Project Manager/Product Manager** **Mission** We are looking for a Solutions Engineer with an engineering background to own the successful delivery and implementation of Protex AI, data integration, and feature projects with some of the biggest companies in the world, ensuring every engagement lands on defined technical success criteria and creates the conditions for deeper deployment across the site. **The Role** You will act as a subject matter expert to own the success of client projects after the system is live, the use case deployments, data integration projects, and new pilot feature rollouts that convert a connected site into a high\-value, growing Protex deployment. You are accountable for scoping, coordinating, and delivering against technical success criteria from close collaboration with the client. You sit at the intersection of Product, our Engineering teams, and the client, translating requirements into executable plans, holding delivery to measurable outcomes, and surfacing commercial opportunity through technical credibility. Over time, you raise the abstraction level: turning field patterns into better integration standards, onboarding frameworks, and feature beta, pilot, trial and project rollout playbooks that scale. **What You Own** **Use Case Projects** Scoped, time\-bound delivery of specific Protex use cases with enterprise clients, from requirement collection and alignment through software build, model training, configuration, validation, and confirmed technical success. You define what done looks like before work begins. **Data Integration Projects** End\-to\-end delivery of integrations between Protex and client systems, ERP, CMMS, BI platforms, safety management tools. You own the project plan, the client relationship during delivery, and confirmation that data flows correctly and reliably. **Hardware Integration Projects** Delivery of integrations between Protex and physical site infrastructure, PLCs, access control systems, audio alerting hardware and speaker networks, bespoke or non\-standard camera configurations, and edge devices. You own the scoping of hardware dependencies, coordination with client facilities and engineering teams, and confirmation that physical systems are correctly connected, triggering as expected, and producing reliable signals into the Protex platform. **New Feature Delivery with Clients** Ownership \& coordination of early access, beta, and feature rollout projects with named accounts. You manage expectations, gather structured feedback, and ensure the client realises value from new capability before general availability. **Technical Success Criteria** Jointly defined, measurable outcomes for every project. Criteria are specific, agreed upfront, and used as the gate for project closure, not subjective satisfaction. **Deployment Expansion** Active identification and pursuit of expansion opportunities within accounts, additional cameras, new use cases, adjacent sites. You use delivery success as the commercial lever. You understand what's deployed, what's not, and why it should be. **Delivery Playbooks** Reusable frameworks for how Protex runs use case, integration, and feature projects. You identify friction, document what works, and feed structural gaps back into product and engineering. **Responsibilities** * Scope and plan client projects with clear technical success criteria and milestones * Run concurrent delivery workstreams across multiple enterprise accounts * Coordinate internal product and engineering resources without direct authority * Lead client\-facing project calls, working sessions, and technical reviews * Identify and escalate delivery risk early, with a resolution path attached * Translate technical complexity into clear client communication * Document delivery outcomes and surface recurring patterns as product input * Drive project closure with verified sign\-off against agreed success criteria **What We're Looking For** * An engineering background \- someone technical enough to understand how systems connect, estimate integration lift, identify failure modes, and identify opportunities and tangible solutions on the fly. You don't need an engineer in the room to have a credible technical conversation * Experienced in enterprise SaaS delivery integrations, data products, or AI/ML feature rollouts * Comfortable juggling and owning measurable outcomes and commercial expansion targets, not just activity or milestones * Able to define and hold to technical success criteria in ambiguous, fast\-moving client contexts * Understands data pipelines, integrations, and configuration interdependencies well enough to scope work, spot risk, and challenge assumptions * Direct, credible client communicator who manages expectations without overpromising, and knows when to push back * Commercial instinct reads the account, recognises expansion signals, and knows how to move opportunity forward in partnership with Client Success \& Account Management * Comfortable operating across technical and commercial conversations in the same client engagement * Prior exposure to industrial, manufacturing, or logistics environments a strong plus * Familiarity with data connectivity platforms, Snowflake, Salesforce, SAP, or similar * High agency, moves fast, removes blockers, escalates with context and a proposed path forward * Able to build lightweight prototypes, data mockups, or proof\-of\-concept outputs using available AI tools and client data, to unblock decisions, validate assumptions, or demonstrate value before full engineering investment **What Success Looks Like** * Every project closes against defined technical success criteria * Clients understand what they're getting, when, and how success will be measured * Deployment footprint and thus value grows within accounts, more data integrations, more cameras, more use cases, more sites * Integration and use case delivery velocity improves quarter over quarter * Product and Engineering receive structured, actionable feedback from every delivery * Expansion opportunities are identified, qualified, and converted through delivery relationships * Client Project Delivery patterns become repeatable Protex AI is an inclusive and equal opportunities employer. We are committed to creating an equitable workplace for everyone regardless of gender, civil status, family status, sexual orientation, religion, age, disability, education level, or race.

title: Technical Support Engineer
description: **Position:** Technical Support Engineer **Location:** Dublin (IE) **Languages:** Excellent communication skills in English and German – any additional language (Italian, Swedish, French, Spanish) will be a plus. **Move Security Forward with Acre** Are you passionate about transforming the future of security? Do you thrive in a collaborative, innovative environment where your contributions drive real impact? If so, Acre Security is the place for you. C\#, Python, SQL, Flutter, and MongoDB. * Proven ability to set up and deliver high\-level technical training * Experience in creating, updating, and maintaining technical documentation * Solid background in project management * Analysis competency in combination with a pragmatic realisation mindset **What’s In It For You** We strive to do more than just match your ambitions — when you join Acre, you’ll have access to a range of exciting opportunities: * Be part of a disruptor – Help move security forward with a company that challenges the status quo and redefines industry standards. * Learn from industry leaders – Work alongside experts and innovators driving real change in security technology. * Drive meaningful impact – Your work will directly contribute to pioneering security technologies that protect businesses and communities worldwide. * Advance your career – Access professional development opportunities, including training programs, mentorship, and industry events. * Enjoy competitive rewards – We offer a competitive compensation package, performance\-based incentives, and a comprehensive benefits program that reflects your contributions. **Join the Future of Security** At Acre, we’re moving security forward. title: Telecoms Professional - WAN Program Delivery
description: **Vacancy Number:** 28420 **Category:** Engineering \- Telecoms **Job Type:** Full\-time Position Description Telecommunications are reshaping how we live and work, enabling the remote management of critical systems and assets. At ESB Networks, our Telecoms Group of over 100 professionals provides the essential operational networks that power the communication systems controlling Ireland’s electricity distribution, transmission, and generation infrastructure. We operate and manage Ireland’s largest private telecommunications network, positioning ESB Networks among Europe’s leading utilities developing private mobile networks for operational use. Within Networks Telecoms, the WAN Program Delivery Team leads the delivery and service ownership of advanced telecom technologies including DWDM and PDH/SDH migrating to MPLS\-TP, fibre, Microwave Radio, SCADA UHF polling radio, Satellite\-based SCADA, Operational IP, and the development of a future LTE network. Drive improvement through innovation, technical knowledge sharing, and adoption of emerging telecom technologies. Experience with routing protocols (OSPF, IS‑IS, BGP, RSVP‑TE, Segment Routing) Excellent analytical and problem\-solving skills in troubleshooting network faults for IP and Optical networks, supported by strong workflow/ticketing system proficiency. NRSI/ NRSII or progressing towards achieving this qualification. CONA (Certified Optical Network Associate) or/and CONE (Certified Optical Network Engineer). Business case preparation. Project Management qualification. Location ESB Networks Leopardstown Road. ESB is committed to smart working – combining digital tools with a culture of trust and empowerment to enable flexible ways of working. The successful candidate may work flexibly within their jurisdiction with attendance at the workplace for in\-person collaboration on at least two anchor days per week. Reporting to WAN Program Delivery Manager, Networks Telecoms. Why Work with Us? Opportunity to lead Ireland’s transition to net zero carbon future Progressive, hybrid working model Career development through mentoring and training Corporate Social Responsibility Opportunities Sports and Social Clubs Networking opportunities Credit Union Generous Pension Access to staff well\-being programmes Generous parental leave entitlements Strong values\-based and inclusive culture Strong commitment to diversity, equity and inclusion **Great team environment working to our Core Values:** Courageous, Caring, Driven and Trusted Salary €49,000 to €56,000 per annum Closing Date 26th June 2026 Diversity, Equity and Inclusion Statement ESB is committed to being an equal opportunities employer. We welcome applications from all sections of society and ensure that no one is discriminated against on the grounds of race, religion or belief, ethnicity or nationality, disability, age, citizenship, marital status, domestic or civil partnership status, sexual orientation or gender identity, or any other basis as protected by law. Applicants who anticipate requiring assistance or reasonable accommodations for any part of the application or interview process may contact, in confidence, recruitment@esb.ie. About ESB Join us in our mission to achieve a net\-zero electricity system by 2040\. ESB is Ireland’s leading energy utility, with activities spanning electricity generation, transmission and distribution, energy supply, energy services and international consultancy. title: Test Analyst
description: We are seeking an experienced IT Test Analyst to join a dynamic technology team responsible for delivering high\-quality digital solutions. The successful candidate will play a key role in ensuring that new systems, enhancements, and integrations meet defined business and technical standards. This is a hands\-on testing role requiring strong analytical ability, a structured approach to quality assurance, and a commitment to excellence. **Role Purpose** The IT Test Analyst will be responsible for planning, executing, and coordinating all phases of software testing across multiple projects. This includes developing test strategies, designing test cases, managing test environments, and collaborating closely with development and business teams to ensure successful delivery. **Core Responsibilities** * Analyse business and technical requirements to understand system functionality and testing needs. * Design and maintain comprehensive test plans, scripts, and scenarios to validate functionality, usability, performance, and security. * Conduct manual and automated testing activities to verify system behaviour and data integrity. * Manage test environments, datasets, and configurations to support accurate and repeatable test execution. * Identify, log, and track software defects through to resolution using appropriate tools and processes. * Provide clear, concise reporting on test outcomes, risks, and quality metrics to stakeholders. * Collaborate closely with developers, analysts, and project managers to resolve issues and enhance solution quality. * Support the continuous improvement of testing processes, tools, and documentation standards. **Experience \& Qualifications** * Minimum 3 years’ experience in a software testing or QA role within a technology\-focused environment. * Relevant third\-level qualification in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field. * Proven experience testing web, cloud, or enterprise applications. * Strong knowledge of software testing principles, tools, and methodologies. * Understanding of the software development lifecycle (SDLC) and common delivery approaches such as Agile or Waterfall. * Experience with defect management and test management tools (e.g., JIRA, Azure DevOps, TestRail). * Ability to create and maintain traceability between requirements, test cases, and results. * Excellent analytical, documentation, and communication skills. * Strong attention to detail and a commitment to producing high\-quality work. * Ability to work independently and contribute effectively within a team setting. **Desirable Attributes** * Professional certifications in software testing or quality assurance (e.g., ISTQB Foundation Level or equivalent). * Experience with test automation frameworks or scripting languages. * Exposure to API, integration, or performance testing. * Familiarity with DevOps and CI/CD environments. * Demonstrated initiative, curiosity, and a proactive approach to learning new tools and technologies. **Personal Qualities** * A structured thinker who enjoys problem\-solving and continuous improvement. * Excellent communicator who can translate technical concepts for non\-technical stakeholders. * Reliable, accountable, and focused on delivering results. * Adaptable and comfortable working in a fast\-paced environment with changing priorities.

title: Textiles Merchandiser/Planner
description: Dunnes Stores is Ireland’s leading retailer positioned at the cutting edge of food, fashion and home retailing. We have over 130 stores in Ireland, Northern Ireland and Spain, a strong e commerce business and are expanding our service and product offering all the time. The Textiles Merchandise Controller key function is to create and manage the Open to Buy and stock targets for the season. They are responsible for maintaining the availability of core \& volumes lines and developing the overall range plan with the buyer agreeing quantities, ranging by grade and the intakes required to achieve the budget, reforecasting in season and the actions on aged stock / slow sellers and markdowns. **Responsibilities:** **Planning:** * Planning seasonal Budgets at section class level with the Department Buyers * Set the related Open to Buy plan for the season, update and coordinate the actions on potential overtrades/ underperforming areas with the buying team to adjust the forward buy requirement * Sign off of the core \& volume lines units within the weekly forecast sheets and ensuring continuous flow from suppliers * Purchase order sign off – ensure intakes are within the Dept OTB by week and are planned within the sales plan allowing for a launch allocations and replen for all stores ranged. Confirming the charges, pricing and margin are accurate and within the budget plan. * Co\-ordinate buy volumes with Online / Regions within the budget /open to buy. * Working with buying team and Online Merchandising team to maintain online availability, agreeing season \& launch qtys, Online specific packs and ensuring replenishment is actioned daily. * Manage launches Fashion \& Transitional stories and seasonal events. * Planning and controlling Department overheads. **Stock Management:** * Identify current shortages / oversupply of stock levels within stores/ online / warehouse and agree the actions to be taken. * General markdowns (slow sellers / seasonal clean ups etc.) – Identify and action. * Reviewing size ratio issues and confirming changes on forward cuts with suppliers. * Monitoring store performance for sales, intake, stockholding, markdowns etc. through regular contact with stores and store visits * Margin checks receipt v booked to adjust correct charges on Purchase orders. * Manage shipping approvals within the open to buy; including working with suppliers on shipment plan / late deliveries / cancellations etc. * Follow up with Shipping Team on container status, paperwork and inbound issues. * Manage bulk returns / supplier penalties daily. * Supplier analysis \& compliance. * Work with the Spanish team on the container fills and keep the auto replenishment upload updated for the correct minimum fills and related SOM exclusion files. **Admin** * Overseeing the administrative function of the buying departments and developing the skills of the Trainee Merchandiser and Administrator including general allocations to stores / online **If this sounds like the job for you, please apply now!** **Dunnes Stores is an Equal Opportunities Employer**

title: Thoroughbred Talents Graduate Programme - IT Graduate
description: Our Thoroughbred Talents Graduate Programme (IT Stream) will commence in October 2026\. This is a unique two\-year programme designed to immerse graduates in the dynamic and evolving technology landscape that supports the Irish horse racing industry. Throughout the programme, you will rotate across multiple IT disciplines, gaining exposure to core operational support, software development, project delivery, and cyber security. As part of Horse Racing Ireland (HRI), you will play a key role in supporting and enhancing the digital infrastructure that underpins racecourses, racing operations, and the wider industry. This programme provides a structured pathway to develop both technical expertise and business understanding within a fast\-paced, innovative, and industry\-critical environment. **Programme Rotations** The programme will encompass rotations across the following key areas within the IT department: * IT Shared Services \- Service Desk * Applications Development / Microsoft 365 Technologies * Project Management Office (PMO) \& Continuous Improvement * Cyber Security **IT Shared Services \- Service Desk (1st Line Support)** Graduates will begin their journey in the IT Servicedesk team, providing first\-line technical support across HRI, its racecourses, and supported entities e.g. IHRB. This placement builds essential technical and customer service skills, forming a critical foundation for your IT career. You will: * Provide first\-line technical support to employees across hardware, software, and network issues. * Log, troubleshoot, and resolve service desk tickets within agreed service levels. * Support user onboarding and offboarding processes, including account creation and equipment setup. * Assist with maintaining laptops, desktops, mobile devices, and peripherals. **Applications Development / Microsoft 365 Technologies** In this rotation, graduates will gain exposure to building and enhancing business solutions through either: ***Applications Development:*** * Support the design, development, testing, and deployment of internal systems * Assist in maintaining and improving applications supporting racing and business operations ***Microsoft 365 \& Cloud Technologies:*** * Support administration of Microsoft 365, including SharePoint and Power Platform tools * Assist in automation and reporting solutions using Power BI and Power Automate * Contribute to system upgrades, patching, and maintenance activities * Maintain IT asset and configuration records **Project Management Office (PMO) and Continuous Improvement** Within the PMO, graduates will gain insight into how technology projects are delivered across HRI. You will work as part of a project management team helping deliver a variety of projects and change initiatives the work will. This placement will develop your organisational, analytical, and communication skills. Key duties include: * Assist in the delivery of IT projects and system implementations. * Participate in testing, documentation, and deployment activities. * Identify opportunities to improve processes and user experience. * Contribute to IT documentation, knowledge articles, and training materials. **CyberSecurity** In this rotation, graduates will explore the technologies shaping the future of HRI's IT environment. You will gain hands\-on experience in: * Supporting cybersecurity initiatives and best practices. * Assisting with user access reviews and security audits. * Helping monitor security alerts and escalate potential risks. * Promoting cyber awareness among employees. **Learning \& Development** As part of the programme, you will: * Complete structured training and certification pathways aligned to each rotation * Stay informed on emerging technologies and industry trends * Participate in team workshops, mentoring, and graduate development initiatives * Build both technical capabilities and essential professional skills **Programme Experience** In addition to your rotational placements, you will: * Work across HRI's key locations, mainly in Newbridge (Co. Kildare) and on occasion at selected racecourses such as Fairyhouse, Navan, Leopardstown, and Tipperary * Contribute to IT systems that directly support racing events, operations, and customer experiences * Collaborate with experienced IT professionals and cross\-functional teams * Gain exposure to both operational IT support and strategic technology initiatives * Participate in structured learning and development to build technical and professional skills **Qualifications We Are Seeking:** Essential: * A Level 8 honours degree (or higher) in: * Information Technology * Computer Science * Software Engineering * Cyber Security * Information Systems * Or a related technology discipline (completed within the last two years) Desirable (not essential): * Knowledge of cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or Google Cloud) * Experience with programming or scripting (e.g. Python, PowerShell, JavaScript) * Understanding of cybersecurity principles * Familiarity with: * ITIL frameworks * Active Directory * Virtualisation technologies * Service desk tools **Key Qualities We Are Looking For** * **Passion for Technology:** A genuine interest in IT, digital transformation, and emerging technologies. * **Interest in Racing:** An enthusiasm for working within the horse racing industry and contributing to its continued innovation * **Problem\-Solving Skills:** Strong analytical ability with a proactive approach to troubleshooting and improvement * **Ambitious and Innovative:** A desire to learn, grow, and make a meaningful impact * **Team Player:** Excellent communication skills and a collaborative approach to working with colleagues and stakeholders * **Relevant Experience:** Internships, academic projects, or extracurricular activities demonstrating technical or analytical capabilities * **Adaptability:** Ability to work across different systems, teams, and environments in a fast\-paced organisation * **Transport:** A full driving licence and access to transport is required **Why Join Horse Racing Ireland's IT Graduate Programme?** This programme offers a unique opportunity to develop your IT career within an organisation at the heart of Ireland's horse racing industry. You will gain hands\-on experience across a wide range of IT disciplines while contributing to systems that support one of Ireland's most vibrant and internationally recognised industries. **Selection Process:** * **Application Submission:** Complete the application questions, providing details about your educational background, relevant experiences, and motivations for joining the graduate programme. * **Application Review** Our recruitment team will review all applications to assess qualifications, skills, and alignment with the programme's objectives. This stage involves a careful examination of academic achievements, extracurricular activities, and any additional supporting information provided. * **Selection Assessments** Shortlisted candidates are invited to complete a set of selection assessments designed to evaluate aptitude, analytical skills, and suitability for the specific roles within the graduate programme. * **First Round Interviews** Successful candidates from the assessment stage are then invited to participate in first\-round interviews. These interviews are typically conducted by the HR team and hiring managers and will focus on exploring your motivations, experiences, and suitability for the programme. * **Second\-Round interviews with Senior Management** Candidates who successfully navigate the initial interview stage are invited to a second round, where you will have the opportunity to interact with senior management. This stage delves deeper into candidate's potential contributions to the organization and allows senior leaders to assess the alignment of the candidate with the overall strategic goals of the company. * **Final Selection** After thorough evaluation and consideration of all stages, the final selection is made. Successful candidates will be offered a place on the Thoroughbred Talents Graduate Programme, marking the beginning of your professional journey with the organisation. HRI is an equal opportunities employer, and we are committed to inclusivity and accessibility. We will provide any necessary reasonable accommodation for candidates during the interview process.

title: Trainee Financial Advisor/Qualified Financial Advisor
description: **Actual Insurances** About Us Actual Insurances is one of Ireland’s largest and fastest\-growing financial brokerages, employing 9**0\+ professionals nationwide**. Due to this continued growth, we are now recruiting for the position of Trainee Financial Advisor and also for the position of Qualified Financial Advisor for our Sallins office. We specialise in providing expert advice across: * Life insurance * Pensions * Savings \& investments * Health, car, home, travel \& dental insurance * Commercial insurance The Role As a Financial Advisor with Actual Insurances, you will play a key role in delivering trusted advice and exceptional service to our clients. **Key Responsibilities:** * Deliver a consistently high standard of professional customer service * Conduct detailed fact\-finds to understand client needs and financial objectives * Recommend and sell suitable financial and insurance products * Work towards and exceed individual sales targets * Maintain accurate client records using CRM and administration systems * Ensure all activity is carried out in full compliance with regulatory requirements What We’re Kildare * Tipperary * Charlestown, Co.
